title: Optimized fps simple
description: A simple pack for people who just want better Performance
body:
# Welcome to Optimized fps simple            
             

           
                    
## what the pack is about 
**Neo/Forge Based Modpack featuring Performance mods to make Minecraft run faster 1.7.10 - 1.21.10.**


## The goal of the pack
**This modpack has been designed with improving performance with the bare minimum amount of mods, with No QOL mods** 


## Up to date
**Optimized fps simple receives updates for all verisons old and new**
